free_text: Scattering of 185 MeV Protons from Zr-90.
The Zirconium Targets were Metallic Foils,Enriched to
97.8% in Zr-90.In the Measurements of Differential
Cross Sections the Thickness Used was 97+-7 Mg/Cm**2,
In the Polarization Measurements the Targets were 184
Energy Specta of Proton Obtained at the Angles
Of 7, 15 and 40 Degrees from Zr-90 were Measured.
For the Differential Cross Section Uncertainties in the
Background Subtraction is Present.The Uncertainty in
The Angular Setting is 0.05 Degree.The Uncertainties in
The Absolute Scales are 15% For the Differential Cross
Sections,5% For Polarization and 0.2% For the
